title: How to design a multi-agent system that skips the LLM
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates a multi-agent system architecture that avoids unnecessary LLM calls by using deterministic code for tasks like route planning. The Race Condition system deploys 1,000 agents using Google's Agent Development Kit, employing the before_model_callback pattern to skip the LLM where direct computation is more appropriate, with session state managed via Redis.
